title: digitaria exilis
intro: Digitaria exilis, also known as African foxtail or finger millet, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Digitaria exilis include reducing inflammation and improving blood sugar control, as well as providing essential nutrients like iron, calcium, and phosphorus. The herbal preparations of Digitaria exilis include infusions, decoctions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments and support overall health.
